context.project: XH-202630 科研文献智能助手 — 领域知识个性化生成与多智能体协同决策系统研究
context.milestone: FM3：论文分析与对比页面完成
context.requirement: 实现 useSSE 组合函数（连接/断开/重连）：(1) 接收 analysisId Ref；(2) connect() 创建 EventSource(url) 并监听 agent_state_update / analysis_completed；(3) onerror 自动重连 3s 间隔，最多 5 次；(4) disconnect() 主动关闭；(5) onUnmounted 自动 disconnect；(6) 状态 isConnected/reconnectAttempts/lastEventTime；(7) 显式传入 onAgentUpdate 与 onCompleted 回调以便与 store 解耦；(8) TypeScript 严格类型。

reference_docs.path: docs/frontend/前端模块系统架构文档.md
reference_docs.purpose: useSSE 规范（13.1 节）、SSE 事件格式

related_modules.description: 该文件当前不存在（FM1 阶段未实施），需新建
updateAgentState 已有；可由回调触发

existing_implementations.description: 已内嵌 EventSource 连接实现（FM2 阶段过渡方案），应迁移到 useSSE

relevant_modules.name: useSSE
relevant_modules.responsibility: SSE 连接封装（连接/断开/重连）

key_interfaces.name: useSSE
key_interfaces.signature: (options: { analysisId: Ref<string|null>, onAgentUpdate?: (state: AgentStateUpdate) => void, onCompleted?: (payload: {analysisId: string}) => void, onError?: (err: unknown) => void }) => { isConnected, reconnectAttempts, lastEventTime, connect, disconnect, reconnect }

relevant_modules.name: AgentStateUpdate
relevant_modules.responsibility: SSE agent_state_update 事件 payload 类型（应新增）

files_to_modify.description: 实现 useSSE composable，封装 EventSource 生命周期 + 重连逻辑
新增 AgentStateUpdate SSE 事件 payload 类型

functional_requirements.description: useSSE options: { analysisId: Ref<string|null>, onAgentUpdate?: (data: AgentStateUpdate) => void, onCompleted?: (data: { analysisId: string }) => void, onError?: (err: unknown) => void, autoConnect?: boolean, reconnectInterval?: number (默认 3000), maxReconnect?: number (默认 5) }
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: options 类型完整；默认参数正确

functional_requirements.description: 返回 refs: isConnected = ref(false)、reconnectAttempts = ref(0)、lastEventTime = ref<number|null>(null)。返回方法: connect()、disconnect()、reconnect()（强制立即重置 attempts 后重连）
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 3 个 ref + 3 个方法签名正确

functional_requirements.description: connect()：(1) 若 analysisId.value 为 null 返回；(2) disconnect 旧连接；(3) url = analysisApi.getAgentStreamUrl(analysisId.value)；(4) new EventSource(url)；(5) addEventListener('agent_state_update', e => { lastEventTime = Date.now(); try { onAgentUpdate?.(JSON.parse(e.data)) } catch {} })；(6) addEventListener('analysis_completed', e => { lastEventTime = Date.now(); onCompleted?.(JSON.parse(e.data)); disconnect() })；(7) onerror = () => { isConnected = false; eventSource.close(); if (reconnectAttempts < maxReconnect) { reconnectAttempts++; setTimeout(connect, reconnectInterval) } else { onError?.(...) } }；(8) onopen = () => { isConnected = true; reconnectAttempts = 0 }
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: EventSource 完整生命周期；onerror 重连

functional_requirements.description: onUnmounted(自动调用 disconnect)；onScopeDispose(setup scope 失效时也调用 disconnect)；autoConnect=true 时在 onMounted 调用 connect
AgentStateUpdate 类型：{ agentName: AgentName; status: AgentStatus; progress?: number; intermediateResult?: string; durationMs?: number; error?: string; timestamp?: number }

field_naming.rule: TypeScript camelCase；SSE JSON 字段直接解析为 AgentStateUpdate 类型（camelCase）

frontend.rule: composable 不直接调用 Store；通过回调解耦

frontend.approach: JSON.parse 失败静默忽略；onerror 调用 onError 回调；超过 maxReconnect 不再重试

forbidden_actions.action: 在 useSSE 中直接调用 agentStore.updateAgentState
forbidden_actions.reason: composable 应与 Store 解耦，通过回调注入

forbidden_actions.action: 在 onUnmounted 之外不调用 disconnect
在 URL 中暴露 Token
forbidden_actions.reason: SSE 认证应通过 Cookie 或后端 Token 解析

unit_tests.description: connect 后 isConnected=true；disconnect 后 false；onUnmounted 自动 disconnect
onerror 触发后 reconnectAttempts++；3s 后重连；超过 maxReconnect 停止
agent_state_update 触发 onAgentUpdate；analysis_completed 触发 onCompleted+disconnect

verification_commands.command: cd Veritas/frontend && npx vitest run src/__tests__/composables/useSSE.spec.ts

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 重连 3s 间隔、最多 5 次
